title: very-blue-world
body:
# Very Blue World

--------

A mod to turn your Minecraft blue.

![A screenshot of a minecraft world where all blocks, the pickaxe in the hand of the player, the hotbar, and the clouds are blue.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GPDTF35y/images/0d15940b2f40137ed298889c090f07b7c74e2ec0.png)

Technical note:
This works by replacing every image resource with an image of the same size and alpha,
but the color channels changed to blue during the resource loading.
